title: Incapacitated
excerpt: An incapacitated creature can't take any action, Bonus Action, or Reaction, can't speak, and their Concentration is broken.
markdown:
# Incapacitated

While you have the Incapacitated condition, you experience the following effects:

*   **Inactive.** You can't take any [[action]], [[bonus_action]], or [[reaction]].
*   **No Concentration.** Your [[concentration]] is broken.
*   **Speechless.** You can't speak.
*   **Surprised.** If you're Incapacitated when you roll [[initiative]], you have [[advantage_disadvantage|Disadvantage]] on the roll.
